# Traffikora - AI-Powered Marketing Automation Platform

## What is Traffikora?
Traffikora is an automated marketing platform for small and mid-size businesses.
It optimizes business visibility across Google Search, Google Maps, ChatGPT,
Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, and all major AI engines - automatically.
Clients connect their accounts once and the platform handles everything forever.

## Who is Traffikora for?
- Small business owners who lack time or marketing staff
- Local businesses (restaurants, retail, service providers)
- Marketing agencies managing multiple client accounts
- E-commerce brands wanting automated multi-channel presence

## Core Features
- Automated Google Business Profile optimization
- AI engine visibility (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot)
- Social media content creation and scheduling
- SEO content generation and publishing
- Review management and response automation
- Analytics dashboard with AI and Google performance tracking

## Pricing
- Starter: $97/month - 1 location, core automation
- Pro: $197/month - 3 locations, full AI engine optimization
- Agency: $797/month - 10 locations, white-label dashboard
- Enterprise: $1,497/month - unlimited locations, dedicated support
- All plans include a 7-day free trial
